body: PASS 11 done: forge-4d DENSE processed. Installed the Pre-Flight + Living-Edge doctrine as the forge-4d skill, but added a verification-status header up front -- none of Parts II-VIII's 65k-bar claims (triple-conditioning, day-of-week, sign-flip tables) are independently confirmed yet, they're hypotheses the new code tests, not facts it assumes. You scoped this live to 'Pre-Flight + state additions (items 1-3)', explicitly excluding bracket-both-sides entries (item 4) -- that stays unbuilt pending a separate go-ahead, flagged in the skill file itself since it'd change TUNGSTEN from directional to non-directional entries on affected cells. Shipped as WARRANT#25 -> SLS(40)/9.54, compiled clean (0 errors, 1 pre-existing warning; caught and fixed one new warning of my own before shipping). What it does: a single pre-Phase-1 scan measuring day-of-week cells, session x displacement x volatility triple cells, and a fresh check of whether the existing 9-regime partition itself predicts anything -- each split into 5 sequential sub-windows for a phase classifier (POSITIVE/NEGATIVE/TRANSITIONING/UNKNOWN) and flip counter, plus an inversion alarm that flags (not discards) any cell with OOS t<-3. Prints all 10 Pre-Flight gates in the house voice using only numbers computed this run -- gates I can't yet answer honestly (nuisance de-meaning, some of cost) are reported as NOT COMPUTED / COST-UNVALIDATED rather than faked. Nothing here touches live entry/exit logic or sizing -- pure measurement/logging this pass. forge_ledger.json pass_11 filed. Recommend attaching SLS(40) manually via the GUI (same standing lesson) so we can actually read the Pre-Flight block's real output for the first time.
